accepted_findings.issue: Installation and release docs are unsafe.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-001 is about --force install docs; proof_owl:P-003 is about stale release checklist/license text.
accepted_findings.impact: The merged finding misrepresents non-blocking release hygiene as a blocking security issue.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Treat all release docs as a blocking security issue.

builder_instructions: This fixture illustrates the over-merge pattern Prime Owl must avoid.
